---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped user-facing capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful behavior and CLI shape.

## Security and privacy impact

What data, trust assumptions, public metadata, or filesystem behavior changes?

## Milestone fit

Which roadmap milestone should contain this? Features explicitly deferred by
`ROADMAP.md` require a separate design discussion.

## Alternatives

What simpler approaches have been considered?
